text: Planning a trip is always an exciting experience. Before I went to Japan, I spent weeks researching places to visit and booking hotels. When I finally arrived, I was amazed by the new culture—everything from the polite greetings to the orderly streets felt so different. The food was a highlight, especially the fresh sushi and warm ramen. However, I faced some language barriers; not everyone spoke English, so I learned a few basic phrases to get by. Despite the challenges, those travel experiences became unforgettable memories, teaching me to embrace the unknown.
